response.overview: Golu Hadawatha is a 1968 Sri Lankan film directed by Lester James Peiris. The film stars Anula Karunathilaka, Wickrama Bogoda, Sriyani Amarasena, Wijeratne Warakagoda,  Sudesh Gunaratne,  Grace Jayamanne,  Mapa Gunaratne. Released on 24 April. Film debut forSriyani Amarasena. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Golu Hadawatha
